title: SpaceX's supersized starting valuation could limit future returns
summary: SpaceX's unprecedented IPO size and valuation may constrain future investor returns. The massive starting valuation leaves limited room for appreciation gains.
content: SpaceX’s planned IPO is unprecedented both in deal size and valuation.

zh.title: SpaceX 超大规模首发估值可能限制未来收益
zh.summary: SpaceX 前所未有的 IPO 规模和估值可能限制未来投资者的回报。巨大的初始估值为升值收益留下的空间有限。

title: Former Tesla board member says SpaceX needs to achieve 2 of its 3 moonshots to keep its valuation
summary: A former Tesla board member argues SpaceX must accomplish at least two of three major objectives to justify its record-breaking valuation. The company has achieved the milestone of becoming the largest IPO ever.
content: SpaceX has achieved its goal of becoming the largest IPO on record.

zh.title: 特斯拉前董事会成员表示 SpaceX 需要实现其 3 个登月计划中的 2 个才能维持估值
zh.summary: 特斯拉前董事会成员辩称，SpaceX 必须完成三个主要目标中的至少两个，才能证明其破纪录估值的合理性。该公司已实现成为历史上最大 IPO 的里程碑。

title: SpaceX IPO live updates: Maye Musk arrives at Nasdaq, protesters set up in Times Square
summary: SpaceX's historic IPO launched with high-profile attendance including Maye Musk at Nasdaq, while protesters gathered in Times Square. Live updates tracked real-time pricing, ticker information, and investor access details.
content: Follow SpaceX IPO live updates on price, ticker, broker access, valuation and what investors need to know before shares trade.

zh.title: SpaceX IPO 实时更新：Maye Musk 抵达纳斯达克，抗议者在时代广场集结
zh.summary: SpaceX 的历史性 IPO 在高知名度参与者（包括在纳斯达克的 Maye Musk）的见证下启动，同时抗议者在时代广场集结。实时更新跟踪了实时定价、股票代码信息和投资者获取详情。

title: Jim Cramer's top 10 things to watch in the stock market Friday
summary: Jim Cramer highlighted the top ten stock market developments to monitor on Friday, with SpaceX's record-breaking IPO as the centerpiece. The historic deal marks a major milestone in capital markets.
content: The biggest IPO of all time is finally here.

zh.title: 吉姆·克拉默股市周五需关注的十大事项
zh.summary: 吉姆·克拉默突出了周五需要关注的十大股市发展，其中SpaceX创纪录的IPO是重点。这项历史性交易标志着资本市场的一个重要里程碑。

title: Proposed Iran-U.S. deal would reopen Hormuz strait and lift oil sanctions, Iran state media says
summary: The U.S. and Iran are negotiating a deal that would reopen the Strait of Hormuz and lift oil sanctions on Iran. President Trump confirmed the strait would be reopened immediately upon signing an agreement.
content: U.S. President Donald Trump said Thursday that the Strait of Hormuz would be reopened as soon as a deal is signed.

zh.title: 伊朗国家媒体称：拟议伊朗-美国协议将重新开放霍尔木兹海峡并解除石油制裁
zh.summary: 美国和伊朗正在谈判一项协议，该协议将重新开放霍尔木兹海峡并解除对伊朗的石油制裁。特朗普总统确认海峡将在签署协议后立即重新开放。

title: Have you been mis-sold car finance?
summary: Martin Lewis provides guidance for consumers who believe they have been mis-sold car finance and are considering filing compensation claims. Consumer advocates are helping individuals navigate the process of seeking redress for potentially unfair financing.
content: Martin Lewis has advice for those who have or who are planning to put in a car finance mis-selling claim.

zh.title: 您是否被误售汽车融资？
zh.summary: 马丁·刘易斯为认为自己被误售汽车融资并考虑提出赔偿索赔的消费者提供了指导。消费者倡导者正在帮助个人了解为潜在不公平融资寻求赔偿的过程。

title: The S&P 500 already made a big call on SpaceX stock and index fund investors need to know it
summary: The S&P 500 index has decided not to immediately include SpaceX despite it being the largest IPO in history, significantly affecting millions of index fund investors. This exclusion decision has major implications for retirement portfolios tracking the index.
content: The S&P 500 index, where trillions in retirement savings are invested, said no to the SpaceX IPO, the biggest in history. Here's what that means for portfolios.

zh.title: S&P 500指数已对SpaceX股票做出重大决定，指数基金投资者需要了解
zh.summary: 尽管SpaceX是历史上最大的IPO，但S&P 500指数决定不立即纳入该公司，这对数百万跟踪该指数的指数基金投资者产生了重大影响。这一排除决定对跟踪该指数的退休投资组合具有重大意义。

title: Oil prices fall as investors weigh reports of peace-deal progress between the U.S. and Iran
summary: Oil prices declined as markets reacted to reports of potential U.S.-Iran peace negotiations that could lift sanctions. Both West Texas Intermediate and Brent crude fell on the improved diplomatic outlook.
content: West Texas Intermediate and Brent crude fell on Friday on reports that a potential deal would lift oil sanctions on Iran.

zh.title: 随着投资者权衡美伊和平协议进展报告，油价下跌
zh.summary: 由于市场对可能解除制裁的美伊和平谈判报告做出反应，油价下跌。在外交前景改善的背景下，西德州中质油和布伦特原油价格都有所下降。

title: Here’s what could be SpaceX’s biggest upside surprise, according to a leading Silicon Valley investor
summary: Silicon Valley investor Brad Gerstner identified SpaceX's biggest potential upside following its IPO debut. The discussion also touched on strategic shifts at Nvidia amid evolving market conditions.
content: Brad Gerstner and Gavin Baker discussed the SpaceX IPO as well as a possible pivot for Nvidia.

zh.title: 根据硅谷知名投资者的说法，这可能是SpaceX最大的上升潜力
zh.summary: 硅谷投资者Brad Gerstner在SpaceX上市后，指出了该公司最大的潜在上升空间。讨论还涉及Nvidia在不断变化的市场条件下的战略调整。

title: Here are Friday's biggest analyst calls: Nvidia, SpaceX, AMD, Broadcom, Warby Parker, Adobe, Kratos & more
summary: Wall Street analysts issued major calls on Friday covering multiple technology and aerospace stocks including Nvidia, SpaceX, and AMD. These recommendations guided investor decisions across multiple sectors.
content: Here are Friday's biggest calls on Wall Street.

zh.title: 周五最大的分析师评级：英伟达、SpaceX、AMD、博通、Warby Parker、Adobe、Kratos等
zh.summary: 华尔街分析师周五发布了主要评级，涵盖多只科技和航空航天股票，包括英伟达、SpaceX和AMD。这些建议指导了投资者跨多个行业的决策。

title: Space stocks jump with huge demand as investors clamor for any way 'to get long SpaceX'
summary: Space industry stocks surged as investors sought exposure to SpaceX through multiple vehicles ahead of its IPO debut. Options volumes in related stocks increased significantly, reflecting high demand for participation in the historic deal.
content: Options volumes are booming in stocks with ties to SpaceX ahead of Friday's historic debut.

zh.title: 太空股票随着巨大需求而上涨，投资者争相寻找"看多SpaceX"的方式
zh.summary: 随着投资者在SpaceX首次公开募股前寻求通过多种方式获得SpaceX敞口，太空产业股票飙升。相关股票的期权交易量显著增加，反映了参与这笔历史性交易的高需求。

title: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: Adobe, Rocket Lab, AMD, Carnival & more
summary: Several major stocks including Adobe, Rocket Lab, and AMD experienced significant premarket price movements. These early trading sessions signaled volatility and investor interest ahead of the regular trading day.
content: These are the stocks posting the largest moves before the bell.

zh.title: 盘前涨跌幅最大的股票：Adobe、Rocket Lab、AMD、嘉年华等
zh.summary: Adobe、Rocket Lab和AMD等多只大型股票经历了盘前重大价格变动。这些早期交易时段预示了常规交易日前的波动性和投资者兴趣。

title: JPMorgan says investors are overlooking the upside to Wall Street banks that comes from SpaceX and other mega IPOs
summary: JPMorgan highlighted that major investment banks like Goldman Sachs and Morgan Stanley stand to benefit significantly from record IPO activity and market volatility. The analyst call suggests investors are underestimating trading income upside for large Wall Street banks in Q2.
content: Bumper IPO issuance and crazy market volatility should generate very straong trading income for the largst investment banks in the second quarter. JPMorgan makes a short-term trading call on both Goldman and Morgan Stanley

zh.title: 摩根大通表示投资者忽视了来自SpaceX和其他超级IPO对华尔街银行的上升空间
zh.summary: 摩根大通强调，高盛和摩根士丹利等主要投资银行将从创纪录的IPO活动和市场波动中获益匪浅。该分析师电话会议表明投资者低估了第二季度大型华尔街银行交易收入的上升潜力。

title: IPO investing: What are IPO stocks and the best brokers for IPO access?
summary: The article explains what IPO stocks are and guides investors on which brokers provide early access to IPO shares. While select brokerages offer pre-trading access, all investors can purchase shares once public trading begins.
content: Some brokerages offer IPO access before a company goes public, but anyone can buy shares once trading begins.

zh.title: IPO投资：什么是IPO股票以及提供IPO获取权限的最佳经纪商？
zh.summary: 该文章解释了什么是IPO股票，并指导投资者选择提供IPO股份早期获取权限的经纪商。虽然部分经纪商提供交易前获取权限，但所有投资者在公开交易开始后都可以购买股票。

title: ‘I have no experience with investing’: I inherited $2,000. I’m 42 with two children. What should I do with this money?
summary: A 42-year-old parent with no investment experience seeks guidance on managing a $2,000 inheritance. The query reflects common challenges faced by novice investors seeking to grow unexpected windfalls responsibly.
content: “I would like the money to grow.”

zh.title: "我没有投资经验"：我继承了2000美元。我今年42岁，有两个孩子。我应该如何处理这笔钱？
zh.summary: 一位42岁的父母，没有投资经验，寻求关于如何管理2000美元遗产的指导。这个问题反映了初级投资者寻求负责任地增长意外之财所面临的常见挑战。

title: UK economy contracts as Iran war impact felt
summary: The UK economy shrank in April as the Iran war began affecting businesses, according to official data. This economic contraction reflects how global conflicts can quickly impact domestic markets. The slowdown signals potential challenges for the British economy in coming months.
content: The economy shrank slightly in April as the Iran war began to have an impact on businesses, official data shows.

zh.title: 英国经济收缩 伊朗战争影响显现
zh.summary: 根据官方数据,由于伊朗战争开始影响企业,英国经济在4月份萎缩。这次经济收缩反映了全球冲突如何能迅速冲击国内市场。这种放缓预示英国经济在未来几个月可能面临挑战。

title: 'I was employee number one': SpaceX co-founder reacts to firm's market debut
summary: Tom Mueller, SpaceX's first employee and co-founder alongside Elon Musk in 2002, reflected on the company's transition to going public. This marks a significant milestone for the space technology company. Mueller's perspective as an early team member provides insight into SpaceX's evolution from startup to major corporation.
content: The BBC's Michelle Fleury spoke to Tom Mueller, who was one of the company's founders alongside Elon Musk in 2002.

zh.title: "我是第一号员工":SpaceX联合创始人对公司上市首秀做出回应
zh.summary: 2002年与埃隆·马斯克共同创办SpaceX的第一员工汤姆·穆勒反思了该公司向上市过渡的过程。这对太空技术公司来说是一个重大里程碑。穆勒作为早期团队成员的观点提供了对SpaceX从初创公司到大型公司演变的深入了解。

title: ChatGPT hits a billion monthly app users despite souring public AI sentiment
summary: ChatGPT achieved a billion monthly active users in May, demonstrating rapid AI adoption despite growing concerns about ethical and environmental impacts. The milestone underscores both massive demand for AI applications and public ambivalence about their consequences. This growth occurs amid broader scrutiny of AI's societal effects.
content: ChatGPT reached a billion monthly users in May despite growing unease over its ethical and environmental impacts.

zh.title: ChatGPT达到十亿月活用户 尽管公众对AI的情绪恶化
zh.summary: ChatGPT在5月实现了10亿月活跃用户,证明了尽管对伦理和环保影响的担忧日益增长,AI仍在快速普及。这个里程碑既强调了对AI应用的巨大需求,也反映了公众对其后果的矛盾态度。这种增长发生在对AI社会效应更广泛审查的背景下。

title: BTS-mania poised to boost South Korea's economy well into the future
summary: The BTS phenomenon, driven by global fan spending and tourism, is expected to provide sustained economic benefits to South Korea. The fanbase generates significant revenue through merchandise, concerts, and international travel. This cultural export demonstrates how entertainment can become a major economic driver for nations.
content: BTS-mania, with all the fan spending and travel, is poised to boost South Korea's economy well into the future

zh.title: BTS狂热有望长期促进韩国经济发展
zh.summary: 由全球粉丝消费和旅游驱动的BTS现象预计将为韩国带来持续的经济效益。粉丝群体通过商品、演唱会和国际旅游产生了可观的收入。这种文化出口展示了娱乐如何成为国家的主要经济驱动力。

title: Rocket Lab and these four stocks are joining the Nasdaq 100, with SpaceX waiting in the wings
summary: Rocket Lab and four AI-focused companies are being added to the Nasdaq 100 index, with SpaceX positioned as a likely future addition. The index shakeup reflects investor interest in space technology and artificial intelligence sectors. SpaceX's pending IPO makes it a prime candidate for eventual inclusion.
content: The Nasdaq 100 could imminently include SpaceX, but first it’s getting a shakeup that will usher in another space-technology company and four flashy AI plays.

zh.title: Rocket Lab和四只股票加入纳斯达克100指数，SpaceX蓄势待发
zh.summary: Rocket Lab和四家人工智能公司被添加到纳斯达克100指数，SpaceX被定位为未来的可能添加项。指数调整反映了投资者对太空技术和人工智能领域的兴趣。SpaceX即将进行的IPO使其成为最终纳入的主要候选者。

title: A Chinese start-up's unfolding dilemma exposes cracks in Beijing's tech funding machine
summary: A Chinese startup's struggles have revealed structural weaknesses in Beijing's government-backed tech funding model, which relies on direct equity stakes from officials at multiple levels. This contrasts with the U.S. approach of indirect support through incentives and tax benefits. The issue highlights challenges in how different governments manage tech sector investments.
content: While the U.S. channels support to tech winners indirectly via incentives, Chinese governments at every level take direct equity stakes.

zh.title: 一家中国初创公司的困境暴露了北京科技融资机制的裂缝
zh.summary: 一家中国初创公司的困境暴露了北京政府支持的科技融资模式的结构性弱点，该模式依赖于多个层级官员的直接股权投资。这与美国通过激励措施和税收优惠进行间接支持的做法形成对比。这个问题突出了不同政府在管理科技部门投资方面的挑战。

title: Oil prices fall on hopes of U.S.-Iran deal despite Tehran pushback
summary: Oil prices declined Friday following U.S. President Trump's announcement of a framework agreement with Iran, signaling potential easing of Middle East tensions despite Iranian resistance.
content: Oil prices fell on Friday after U.S. President Donald Trump said Washington had reached a framework agreement with Iran, raising hopes that tensions in the Middle East could ease.

zh.title: 伊朗协议希望推动油价下跌，尽管伊朗反对
zh.summary: 美国总统特朗普宣布与伊朗达成框架协议，油价周五下跌，表明中东紧张局势可能缓解，尽管伊朗提出反对。

title: Stock futures tick higher as Wall Street gears up for SpaceX’s historic IPO: Live updates
summary: Stock futures are rising ahead of SpaceX's debut on Nasdaq Friday, marking the largest IPO in history for Elon Musk's rocket company.
content: Elon Musk's rocket maker is set to debut on the Nasdaq on Friday in what will be the largest IPO in history.

zh.title: 华尔街为SpaceX历史性IPO做准备，股指期货上涨
zh.summary: SpaceX周五在纳斯达克上市，股指期货随之上升，这是埃隆·马斯克火箭公司历史上规模最大的IPO。

title: Pirro's losses in Fed investigation should stay on the books, judge rules
summary: Judge James Boasberg denied U.S. Attorney Jeanine Pirro's request to vacate earlier orders in a Federal investigation, ruling her losses must remain on record.
content: In a scathing ruling, Judge James Boasberg denied U.S. Attorney for the District of Columbia Jeanine Pirro's request to vacate his earlier orders.

zh.title: 法官裁决：皮罗在联邦调查中的损失应保留在案卷中
zh.summary: 法官詹姆斯·博斯伯格驳回了美国律师珍妮·皮罗撤销联邦调查中早期命令的请求，裁定她的损失必须保留在案卷中。

title: I’m 55 and earn $100,000. Should I take a $2,900 monthly pension — or $2,200 with 3% annual hikes?
summary: A 55-year-old earning $100,000 annually seeks guidance on choosing between a $2,900 monthly pension or a $2,200 option with 3% annual increases, planning to work until age 60.
content: “I plan to continue working until age 60.”

zh.title: 我55岁，年收入10万美元。我应该选择每月2900美元的养老金——还是选择每年增加3%的2200美元方案？
zh.summary: 一位年收入10万美元的55岁员工寻求指导，在选择每月2900美元的养老金或2200美元（每年增加3%）的方案之间做出选择，计划工作到60岁。
